name: Quran Cloud
tagline: Read Quran verses, surahs, and editions
description: Discover available Quran editions and retrieve individual ayahs or complete surahs in a selected text, translation, tafsir, transliteration, or recitation edition.

tools.name: list_editions
tools.description: List available Quran editions, optionally filtering by type, format, or language.

params.name: type
params.description: Edition type such as quran, translation, tafsir, transliteration, or versebyverse.

params.name: format
params.description: Edition format, such as text or audio.

params.name: language
params.description: Two-letter language code such as ar or en.

tools.name: get_ayah
tools.description: Retrieve one ayah in a selected edition.

params.name: number
params.description: Global ayah number from 1 to 6236 or a surah:ayah reference such as 2:255.

params.name: edition
params.description: Edition identifier such as en.asad or quran-uthmani.

tools.name: get_surah
tools.description: Retrieve a complete surah in a selected edition.

params.name: edition
params.description: Edition identifier such as en.asad or quran-uthmani.

tools.name: get_random_ayah
tools.description: Retrieve a randomly selected ayah in the default Uthmani edition.
